CustomField.description: System only field. Used in scheduled flow to update the aktuell anställning field.
CustomField.formula: IF(OR (AND(Person__r.LatestEmployment__c <> Id, Status__c = "Aktiv") ,AND(Person__r.LatestEmployment__c = Id, Status__c <> "Aktiv")) ,true, false)
CustomField.label: UpdateNeeded
